reviewer_notes: This page (physical p.431) is titled '出る順！過去問＆完全解説' and contains answer explanations (解答12-2 through 12-5) with detailed prose reasoning for each answer — it is an answer-explanation page, not an exam question page. There are no 4-choice ア/イ/ウ/エ questions presented here; the ア/イ/ウ items appear only as incorrect-option explanations within the answer body. Correct label is 'content'. The existing 'exam' label is incorrect.
